seoTitle: Kembla Heights vs Kempsey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kembla Heights vs Kempsey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kembla Heights and Kempsey.
heading: Kembla Heights vs Kempsey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kembla Heights, New South Wales and Kempsey, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kembla Heights (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kembla Heights or Kempsey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kembla Heights has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Kempsey scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kembla Heights scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Kempsey scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kembla Heights or Kempsey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
